VO_EN: You already know how this ends.
And you haven't even stepped out of the car.
VO_VI: Va ban chua buoc ra khoi xe.

VO_EN: The MDT screen glows blue against the dash.
VO_VI: Man hinh MDT phat sang xanh tren bang dieu khien.

VO_EN: You already know who it is.
VO_VI: Ban da biet nguoi do la ai.
Khong phai vi ban biet ho.

VO_EN: Because you decided before you arrived.
VO_VI: Vi ban da quyet dinh truoc khi den.

VO_EN: The streetlight catches the hood of a car parked crooked at the curb.
VO_VI: Den duong hat len capo mot chiec xe do lech ben via he.

VO_EN: The streetlight catches your eye instead.
VO_VI: Den duong thu hut mat ban.

VO_EN: You look at the address again.
Zip code tells you everything the dispatcher didn't.
VO_VI: Ma vung noi cho ban moi thu ma tong dai khong noi.

VO_EN: The radio hisses once and goes quiet.
VO_VI: Song radio xit mot tieng roi im.

VO_EN: You don't protect people. You sort them.
VO_VI: Ban khong bao ve nguoi ta. Ban phan loai ho.

VO_EN: They teach you a sentence before they teach you to aim.
VO_VI: Ho day ban mot cau truoc khi day ban ngam.

VO_EN: You learn to say it the way you learn to field-strip a weapon.
VO_VI: Ban hoc noi cau do giong nhu hoc thao lap sung.

VO_EN: The training room smells like floor wax and old coffee.
VO_VI: Phong huan luyen co mui sap san va ca phe cu.

VO_EN: The instructor writes it on the board.
Somebody left a jacket on the chair next to you and nobody comes back for it.
VO_VI: Ai do bo mot cai ao khoac tren ghe ben canh ban va khong ai quay lai lay.

VO_EN: Thirty recruits in the room and nobody asks when to use it.
VO_VI: Ba muoi tan binh trong phong va khong ai hoi khi nao dung.

VO_EN: The instructor explains when not to.
VO_VI: Giang vien giai thich khi nao khong duoc dung.

VO_EN: The guy next to you is writing it down like it's homework.
VO_VI: Nguoi ben canh ban ghi chep nhu lam bai tap.
Cau tra loi la khong bao gio.

VO_EN: The holster pulls at your hip.
VO_VI: Bao sung keo hong ban xuong.

VO_EN: The holster pulls at your hip like something that doesn't belong there yet - not heavy enough to hurt, just heavy enough to notice every time you shift in the seat.
VO_VI: Bao sung keo hong ban nhu thu gi do chua thuoc ve noi nay - khong nang du de dau, chi nang du de nhan ra moi lan ban nhich tren ghe.

VO_EN: You walk slower because of it.
VO_VI: Ban di cham hon vi no.

VO_EN: Every step feels heavier on the left side where the holster hangs.
VO_VI: Moi buoc nang hon ben trai, noi bao sung treo.

VO_EN: He adjusts the mirror twice and says something about the weather.
VO_VI: Anh chinh guong hai lan va noi gi do ve thoi tiet.

VO_EN: Your knee touches the door panel and it's cold through your pants.
VO_VI: Dau goi ban cham canh cua va lanh xuyen qua quan.

VO_EN: Something about the weather. That's all you kept.
VO_VI: Gi do ve thoi tiet. Chi con nho the.

VO_EN: The radio fills the silence between you with other people's emergencies - domestic on Fourth, traffic stop on Elm, someone's alarm that won't stop going off.
VO_VI: Radio lap day su im lang giua hai ban bang tinh huong khan cap cua nguoi khac - bao luc gia dinh tren duong Fourth, dung xe tren Elm, chuong bao cua ai do keu khong ngung.
Cuoc goi dau. Khong co gi.
Cuoc goi thu hai. Khong co gi.

VO_EN: You listen to the radio too carefully.
VO_VI: Ban nghe radio qua cham chu.

VO_EN: Waiting for the one that's different.
You hope you never have to use it.
VO_VI: Ban hy vong khong bao gio phai dung no.
Dung xe kiem tra. Khong co gi.

VO_EN: But on the way back to the car your hand drifts to the holster.
VO_VI: Nhung tren duong ve xe, tay ban troi ve phia bao sung.

VO_EN: You wipe your palm on your thigh.
VO_VI: Ban cham long ban tay vao dui.

VO_EN: You stare at your hand like it belongs to someone else.
VO_VI: Ban nhin tay minh nhu no cua nguoi khac.

VO_EN: First time you draw on someone.
VO_VI: Lan dau ban rut sung chia vao nguoi.
Nguoi dan ong dung o cua.
Anh ta khong co vu khi.

VO_EN: You know that before you pull it.
VO_VI: Ban biet dieu do truoc khi rut.
Nhung tay ban van di chuyen.
Moi thu xung quanh dung lai.

VO_EN: A sprinkler two houses down keeps going.
VO_VI: Voi tuoi nuoc cach hai nha van chay.

VO_EN: The dog behind the chain-link stops barking.
VO_VI: Con cho sau hang rao thep ngung sua.

VO_EN: The woman in the doorway presses both hands flat against the frame like she's holding the house up.
VO_VI: Nguoi phu nu o cua ep hai tay vao khung cua nhu dang giu ca ngoi nha.
Moi thu dung lai. Tru ban.

VO_EN: What comes instead is something else.
VO_VI: Thu den thay the la cai gi do khac.

VO_EN: You hold the position longer than you need to.
VO_VI: Ban giu tu the lau hon can thiet.

VO_EN: Because putting it away feels like giving something back.
VO_VI: Vi ha sung xuong giong nhu tra lai thu gi do.

VO_EN: You try to explain it once.
VO_VI: Ban thu giai thich mot lan.

VO_EN: The words sit there for a second and then they break apart like they were never a sentence.
VO_VI: Loi cu o do mot giay roi vo ra nhu chua bao gio la mot cau.

VO_EN: You say each word like you're reading from a card that someone typed up in a classroom three years ago and laminated so it would last.
VO_VI: Ban noi tung tu nhu dang doc tu tam the ai do danh may trong lop hoc ba nam truoc va ep nhua de dung lau.
Co khoang cach giua cac lenh.
Khoang cach de ho tuan theo.
Khong ai hoi tai sao ban rut sung.

VO_EN: Your hand is on the holster again.
VO_VI: Tay ban lai tren bao sung.
Ban khong dat no o do.

VO_EN: The camera blinks red on your chest.
VO_VI: Camera nhap nhay do tren nguc ban.

VO_EN: There's a scratch on the dashboard you haven't noticed before.
VO_VI: Co mot vet xuoc tren bang dieu khien ban chua thay truoc.

VO_EN: You draw again the next week.
VO_VI: Ban rut sung lan nua tuan sau.

VO_EN: This one smells like laundry soap. You notice that.
VO_VI: Nguoi nay co mui xa phong giat. Ban nhan ra dieu do.
Ho dong cung. Ban van di.

VO_EN: The same stillness in your hands.
VO_VI: Cung su tinh lang trong tay ban.

VO_EN: You flex your fingers once and close them back.
VO_VI: Ban co cac ngon tay mot lan roi nam lai.

VO_EN: Your hand is on the holster.
You stop waiting for them to stop.
VO_VI: Ban thoi cho ho dung lai.

VO_EN: You stop waiting for them to understand.
Hands where I can see them.
Your back teeth press together. You taste metal.
VO_VI: Rang ham ban nghien lai. Ban nhan vi kim loai.

VO_EN: They can't finish the first command before the next one lands on top of it - your voice stacking instructions like you're reading a list nobody's meant to follow.
VO_VI: Ho khong kip lam xong lenh dau truoc khi lenh sau de len - giong ban xep chong moi lenh nhu dang doc danh sach khong ai can lam theo.

VO_EN: You think about that for a second.
VO_VI: Ban nghi ve dieu do mot giay.

VO_EN: The command comes after the shot.
The audio doesn't have timestamps in court.
VO_VI: Ban ghi am khong co dau thoi gian truoc toa.

VO_EN: The room smells like carpet cleaner and somebody's lunch from two doors down.
VO_VI: Phong co mui nuoc lau tham va bua trua cua ai do tu phong ben.

VO_EN: One of them has a pen that clicks.
VO_VI: Mot nguoi co cay but bam.

VO_EN: He clicks it seven times before he stops.
VO_VI: Anh ta bam bay lan roi dung.
Ho hoi ban chuyen gi xay ra.

VO_EN: They clear you in forty minutes.
VO_VI: Ho mien tru ban trong bon muoi phut.

VO_EN: You walk out the same way you walked in.
VO_VI: Ban di ra giong het cach ban di vao.

VO_EN: Your shoes make the same sound on the tile.
VO_VI: Giay ban tao cung tieng tren gach.
Bon muoi phut cho mot mang nguoi.

VO_EN: You write 'furtive movement' in the report.
VO_VI: Ban viet 'cu dong dang ngo' trong bao cao.

VO_EN: Two words that mean a man moved his hands.
VO_VI: Hai tu co nghia la mot nguoi da nhuc nhich tay.
Ban da viet dieu do truoc day.

VO_EN: Your handwriting looks the same every time. Same slant. Same spacing.
VO_VI: Net chu ban giong het moi lan. Cung do nghieng. Cung khoang cach.

VO_EN: You don't remember when the first time was.
VO_VI: Ban khong nho lan dau la khi nao.
Dong doi ban thay chuyen xay ra.

VO_EN: Your partner saw what you wrote.
VO_VI: Dong doi ban thay nhung gi ban viet.
Do la hai su kien khac nhau.

VO_EN: He looks at the report and looks at the ceiling and scratches the back of his neck and then he picks up the pen and signs it without reading it again.
VO_VI: Anh nhin bao cao roi nhin tran nha roi gai gay va cam but ky ma khong doc lai.

VO_EN: You close the folder and the paper sticks to your thumb for a second.
VO_VI: Ban dong ho so va giay dinh vao ngon tay cai mot giay.

VO_EN: Their name is in the file somewhere. You close it before you get there.
VO_VI: Ten ho o dau do trong ho so. Ban dong lai truoc khi doc toi.

VO_EN: Your shooting count is the highest in the precinct.
VO_VI: So lan no sung cua ban cao nhat don.

VO_EN: Your shoulders sit higher than they used to. You stopped noticing.
VO_VI: Vai ban cao hon truoc. Ban khong nhan ra nua.

VO_EN: They don't call it a problem.
VO_VI: Ho khong goi do la van de.
Trung si goi ban la chu dong.

VO_EN: You tap the holster snap twice. Just to hear it.
VO_VI: Ban gat khoa bao sung hai lan. Chi de nghe tieng.
Tan binh nhin ban rut sung.

VO_EN: Your eyes stay on the street.
You drive through the neighborhood off duty once.
VO_VI: Ban lai qua khu pho khi nghi phep.

VO_EN: Kids on a porch stop bouncing a ball when you drive past.
VO_VI: Bon tre tren hien ngung nem bong khi ban lai ngang.
Moi thu dung khi ban den.

VO_EN: The words come out before the question finishes.
VO_VI: Loi bat ra truoc khi cau hoi ket thuc.

VO_EN: They come out flat now. Like reading a label.
VO_VI: Chung bat ra phang bep. Nhu doc nhan mac.

VO_EN: They come out the way a cough does.
VO_VI: Chung bat ra nhu tieng ho.

VO_EN: Your lips move before your throat catches up.
VO_VI: Moi ban nhuc truoc khi hong kip theo.

VO_EN: You said it after. You fired before.
VO_VI: Ban noi sau. Ban ban truoc.
Co gi do dem nay khong on.

VO_EN: The sidewalk is wet from a sprinkler that's been running too long.
VO_VI: Via he uot vi voi phun nuoc chay qua lau.

VO_EN: You're not sure when that started.
VO_VI: Ban khong chac khi nao bat dau.

VO_EN: You press your tongue to the roof of your mouth.
VO_VI: Ban ep luoi len vom mieng.

VO_EN: The casing hits the sidewalk and rolls twice before it stops.
VO_VI: Vo dan roi xuong via he va lan hai vong truoc khi dung.

VO_EN: The ID is on the ground.
It was already in their hand.
VO_VI: No da o trong tay ho roi.

VO_EN: The trigger moved before the thought finished.
VO_VI: Co sung dong truoc khi y nghi ket thuc.
Co gi do xay ra trong nguc ban.

VO_EN: You wipe your hand on your pants leg.
VO_VI: Ban cham tay vao ong quan.

VO_EN: The rookie is standing behind you.

VO_VI: Khong phai vi ho quyet dinh.
Quyet dinh cua ban tro thanh cua ho.

VO_EN: The rookie's holster is still snapped shut.
VO_VI: Bao sung tan binh van con cai khoa.
Ban da thay anh mat do truoc.

VO_EN: It's the same look you had once.
VO_VI: Do la anh mat ban tung co.

VO_EN: Before you learned the five words.
VO_VI: Truoc khi ban hoc nam tu.

VO_EN: You don't remember when you lost it.
VO_VI: Ban khong nho khi nao minh danh mat no.

VO_EN: You blink twice. The fluorescent light above hums and you hear it for the first time like it's been waiting for you to notice.
VO_VI: Ban chop mat hai lan. Den huynh quang phia tren vo vo va ban nghe thay lan dau tien nhu no cho ban nhan ra.

VO_EN: You teach the rookie the five words.
VO_VI: Ban day tan binh nam tu.

VO_EN: They sit across from you at the desk.
VO_VI: Ho ngoi doi dien ban o ban.

VO_EN: The fluorescent light above you hums.
VO_VI: Den huynh quang phia tren vo vo.

VO_EN: You don't know how long it's been doing that.
VO_VI: Ban khong biet no keu tu bao gio.

VO_EN: For a second everything in the room lands at once - the rookie's voice repeating the words, the light humming, the stack of folders on your desk, a phone ringing somewhere down the hall - and it all goes flat, like a picture instead of a room.
VO_VI: Trong mot giay moi thu trong phong do xuong cung luc - giong tan binh nhac lai loi, den vo vo, chong ho so tren ban, dien thoai reo dau do cuoi hanh lang - va tat ca tro nen phang, nhu buc anh thay vi can phong.

VO_EN: Then you blink and it's a room again.
VO_VI: Roi ban chop mat va no lai la can phong.

VO_EN: But it sounds wrong in their voice.
VO_VI: Nhung nghe sai trong giong ho.

VO_EN: Like hearing your own voice on a recording.
VO_VI: Giong nhu nghe giong minh trong ban ghi am.

VO_EN: There's a clock on the wall behind them. You look at it without reading the time.
VO_VI: Co dong ho tren tuong phia sau ho. Ban nhin ma khong doc gio.

VO_EN: You try to remember the first time you said it and meant it.
VO_VI: Ban co nho lan dau ban noi cau do va thuc su so.

VO_EN: The rookie uses the five words next month.
VO_VI: Tan binh dung nam tu do thang sau.

VO_EN: You hear about it on the radio.
You open your locker and stare at the inside of the door for a second.
VO_VI: Ban mo tu va nhin mat trong canh cua mot giay.

VO_EN: There's a sticker from the union. Peeling at the corner.
VO_VI: Co mieng dan cua cong doan. Bong o goc.

VO_EN: You look at the report on your desk.
VO_VI: Ban nhin bao cao tren ban.
Ban nhan ra net chu minh.

VO_EN: You don't recognize the person they describe.
VO_VI: Ban khong nhan ra nguoi ma chung mo ta.

VO_EN: There's a stack of files on the desk.
VO_VI: Co chong ho so tren ban.

VO_EN: For a second the words blur together.
VO_VI: Trong mot giay, chu nhoe vao nhau.

VO_EN: You rub your eyes with the heel of your hand.
VO_VI: Ban day mat bang got ban tay.

VO_EN: The words come back into focus.
There's an ID photo stapled to the corner of the file.
VO_VI: Co anh chung minh thu ghim o goc ho so.

VO_EN: The face in the photo is just a face.
VO_VI: Khuon mat trong anh chi la khuon mat.

VO_EN: The photo is passport-size, the kind where nobody looks like themselves.
VO_VI: Anh co kieu passport, loai ma khong ai giong chinh minh.

VO_EN: You write it at the bottom of the page.
The pen is still warm in your hand.
VO_VI: But van am trong tay ban.

VO_EN: You put the pen down and it rolls to the edge of the desk and stays there.
VO_VI: Ban dat but xuong va no lan ra mep ban roi nam do.
Man hinh MDT phat sang xanh.

VO_EN: Same light as the first night.
VO_VI: Cung anh sang nhu dem dau tien.

VO_EN: You hear your own breathing. Same rhythm as the engine.
VO_VI: Ban nghe hoi tho minh. Cung nhip voi dong co.

VO_EN: Your hand is on the holster.
It's just where your hand goes now.
VO_VI: Bay gio tay ban chi o do.

VO_EN: You haven't left the car yet.

VO_VI: Ban khong dat no o do.
